docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MONZO, MARTIN V. AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, JOSE II. MONZO-MUNGUIA, MARIA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONZO, MARTIN V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, JOSE II.
